concerns.text: Task T030 (Compute VIF) must precede T025 (vif_filter.py) because filtering depends on VIF values. Current ordering has T025 before T030, violating producer-consumer dependency. VIF computation is the producer; VIF filtering is the consumer.

Task T006 creates download_and_verify.py with 'placeholder URL' but T017 (sample_dataset.py) depends on actual data. If T006 never obtains real data, T017 samples nothing. This is a broken dependency chain between foundational data acquisition and downstream sampling.

Task T028 (stratification analysis by alloy system type) is not specified in any user story or functional requirement. This is scope creep that violates the spec's independently-shippable unit principle. Either add to spec or remove from tasks.

Task T025 (vif_filter.py) is marked [P] but depends on descriptor data from US1 (T011). It's also a prerequisite for T026 (importance.py). The [P] tag is misleading as it cannot run in parallel with US1 implementation.

Task T017 (sample_dataset.py) is marked [P] but depends on data from T006 (download_and_verify.py). If T006 is a placeholder, T017 cannot actually run. The [P] tag may be incorrect depending on T006's actual output.
